errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your k-veritas account to manage tests.

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.

register.title: Create account
register.success: Account created. You can sign in now.
register.accept_terms: I agree to the terms of service and privacy policy.

errors.conflict: This email is already in use.
errors.rate_limited: Registration limit reached. Try again later.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.description: We'll send a reset link if the email is registered.
forgot.sent: If the email exists, you'll receive a link shortly.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.success: Password updated. Please sign in again.

mfa_enroll.title: Secure your account with MFA
mfa_enroll.description: Scan the QR with your authenticator app and enter the generated code.
mfa_enroll.instructions: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy or any TOTP app.

mfa_verify.title: Verification code
mfa_verify.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa_verify.back_to_login: Sign out and try another account

errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Organize your tests by app, environment, or team.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project so the AI can learn your app.

wizard.title: New project
wizard.subtitle: Tell us about the app and key scenarios. The AI uses this to generate tests.

step1.url_hint: Use staging or preview. Avoid production when testing destructive flows.
step1.auth_hint: If yes, provide test credentials so the crawler can authenticate before exploring.
step1.credentials_note: Credentials are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and used only by the crawler.

step2.description_placeholder: An e-commerce for natural products with cart, Stripe checkout, customer area...
step2.description_hint: A few sentences explaining what the app does.
step2.scenarios_placeholder:
Add product to cart
Checkout with approved card
Empty cart shows message
step2.scenarios_hint: One scenario per line. At least 1, up to 50.

errors.rate_limited: Creation limit reached. Try again later.

errors.crawl_running: A crawl is already in progress.
errors.rate_limited: Wait a moment before starting another crawl.

map.crawling_description: This may take a few minutes. The page updates automatically.
map.empty_description: Check the URL you provided and try re-crawling.

scenarios.empty: No scenarios yet. Add the first one above.

fields.name: Name
fields.target_url_hint: Changing the URL requires a new crawl to reflect the new target.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Deleting the project removes scenarios, crawls, pages and screenshots. This action is irreversible.
danger.confirm_description: You are about to delete "{name}" and everything in it. This cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your name and preferred language.
profile.locale_hint: The page reloads in the new language after saving.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Protect your account with MFA, change your password, and manage active sessions.

mfa.section_subtitle: Add an extra layer of protection at sign-in.
mfa.title: MFA (TOTP)
mfa.enabled_desc: Your account is protected by an authenticator app.
mfa.disabled_desc: MFA is off. We recommend enabling it for better security.
mfa.disable_confirm_description: To confirm, enter your current password. Two-factor protection will be removed.

password.section_subtitle: Change your password. Other sessions are revoked automatically.

sessions.section_subtitle: Devices currently connected to your account.

dashboard.subtitle: Your k-veritas foundation is ready.
dashboard.placeholder_body: Coming soon: Playwright test editor with LLM assistant.
